scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @ai-maestro-lite/server && npm run build --workspace @ai-maestro-lite/desktop
scripts.dist: npm run build --workspace @ai-maestro-lite/server && npm run dist --workspace @ai-maestro-lite/desktop
scripts.dist:win: npm run build --workspace @ai-maestro-lite/server && npm run dist:win --workspace @ai-maestro-lite/desktop
